info.name: Get all connectors for a data source

params.name: data_source_id
params.description: The ID of the data source to get connectors for

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page (1-100)

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for forward pagination - get items after this position. Use last_cursor from previous response.

params.name: before
params.description: Cursor for backward pagination - get items before this position. Use first_cursor from previous response.

params.name: include_total
params.description: Whether to include total count in response (expensive operation)

items.docs:
Get all connectors for a data source.

Args:
    data_source_id: The ID of the data source to get connectors for.
    pagination: The pagination options.

Returns:
    The list of connectors.

params.name: data_source_id
params.description: The ID of the data source to create a connector for

items.docs:
Create a new connector.

Args:
    data_source_id: The ID of the data source to create a connector for.
    params: The connector to create.

Returns:
    The created connector.

params.name: data_source_id

params.name: connector_id
params.description: The ID of the connector to get

items.docs:

params.name: data_source_id
params.description: The ID of the data source to authorize

items.docs:
Start OAuth2 authorization flow for a data source.

Initiates the OAuth2 authorization process by redirecting the user
to the external service's authorization page. After authorization,
the user will be redirected back to the oauth2_callback endpoint.

Args:
    data_source_id: The ID of the data source to authorize

Returns:
    Redirect to the OAuth2 provider's authorization page

Raises:
    DataSourceNotFoundError: When data source doesn't exist
    DataSourceAuthTypeNotSupportedError: When

info.name: OAuth2 callback for data source authorization

params.name: state
params.description: OAuth2 state parameter for CSRF protection

params.name: code
params.description: Authorization code from OAuth2 provider

params.name: error
params.description: OAuth2 error code if authorization failed

params.name: error_description
params.description: Human-readable error description

items.docs:
OAuth2 callback endpoint for completing data source authorization.

This endpoint is called by OAuth2 providers after user authorization.
It exchanges the authorization code for access tokens and stores them
securely for the data source.

Args:
    state: OAuth2 state parameter used for CSRF protection
    code: Authorization code from the OAuth2 provider
    error: OAuth2 error code if authorization was denied or failed
    error_description: Human-readable description of the error

Returns:
